title: Instagram Username Extractor (Keyword Search)
description: Extracts usernames from Instagram keyword search. Auto-discovers related keywords. Saves state so it survives server migrations.

keywords.title: Seed keywords
keywords.description: Starting keywords, e.g. HOKA, Eliud Kipchoge, running shoes, marathon coach.

maxKeywords.title: Max total keywords
maxKeywords.description: Total keywords to process, including seed and auto-discovered related keywords.

maxPagesPerKeyword.title: Pages per keyword
maxPagesPerKeyword.description: Instagram top search does not provide real pagination, so the actor stops after one useful page per keyword.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Residential proxies are strongly recommended for Instagram scraping.
